cleavage agent: Proteins were digested for 16 hours with LysC (1:100 enzyme:protein ratio)
collision energy: MS2 analysis followed collision-induced dissociation (CID, CE = 35)
fragmentation method: MS2 analysis followed collision-induced dissociation (CID, CE = 35)
instrument: data were collected using an Orbitrap Fusion mass spectrometer
labeling: TMT reagents (0.8 mg; Thermo Fisher Scientific)
reduction reagent: disulfide reduction with 5mM tris (2 carboxyethyl) phosphine (TCEP; Sigma Aldrich)
reduction concentration: disulfide reduction with 5mM tris (2 carboxyethyl) phosphine (TCEP; Sigma Aldrich)
